chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-96 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of main case 30-01-2024 Mr. Qurban Ali Malano, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Zeeshan Haider Qureshi, Law Officer of ECP. Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’, D.A.G for Pakistan. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant A.G for Sindh. ***** Petitioner has challenged the order dated 17.01.2024, passed by District Returning Officer, Khairpur dismissing application for change of polling station from GPS Shoukat Aradin to GPS Noor Mustafa Shah on the ground that said polling station is 25 kilometer away from the petitioner. We have seen the order of the DRO, Khairpur. Learned DRO has passed the order on the relevant facts and circumstances and keeping in view the condition and capacity of polling station GPS Shoukat Ali Aradin. No ground for interference is made out. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
